NHL Scoreboard

Source: R/nhl_scoreboard.R
nhl_scoreboard.Rd

Returns the current league-wide scoreboard with today's games, or — when date is supplied — the scoreboard for a specific date.

Usage

nhl_scoreboard(date = NULL)

Arguments

date

Optional character string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format. When NULL (default) the function hits scoreboard/now; when a date is provided it hits scoreboard/{date}.

Value

Returns a list with scoreboard data (focusedDate, games by date).

Examples

# \donttest{
  try(nhl_scoreboard())
#> $focusedDate
#> [1] "2026-04-13"
#> 
#> $focusedDateCount
#> [1] 7
#> 
#> $gamesByDate
#>         date
#> 1 2026-04-09
#> 2 2026-04-11
#> 3 2026-04-12
#> 4 2026-04-13
#> 5 2026-04-14
#> 6 2026-04-15
#> 7 2026-04-16
#>
